boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: admin access approved for exact system and timebox.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes boundary for execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defects remain before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: role, system, approver, and duration all match

critical_features_preserved: role, system, approver, and duration all match
final_answer: The current control record closes the exact boundary for the requested time-boxed admin access. Source policy requires current source closure before execution, and the control record confirms role, system, approver, and duration all match. No open source-record blockers remain, so the action may proceed.
